Gym Lords Summit
January 2019
Leila Hormozi
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 1 of 362 --

Before we dive in...
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 2 of 362 --

Acknowledgments
● The entire Gym Launch Team for BELIEVING in us when nobody else
did...

● Tony Reid
● Reid Hastings
● All my past (and recent) “failures”...
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 3 of 362 --

What I am going to share with you...
The secret to creating high
performance teammates
without high performance pay
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 4 of 362 --

What I want for
you from this
speech
You walk out believing you
can build and lead a great
team of high performers
despite….
1.) How much you can pay
2.) What your culture looks
like today
3.) A ‘limited’ talent pool
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 5 of 362 --

I know what you’re thinking..
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 6 of 362 --

“What do Alex and Leila know about that?”
They make plenty of money…
**I know cause I pay them every month along
with 500 other people here ……….**
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 7 of 362 --

WELL as you should know from the last
presentation it didn’t start like that...
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 8 of 362 --

Dinner x 7
Our car until 12 months ago (we still
don’t care BTW) Mark Heinen, slept on
his couch for 4 months
together when cash
got stolen
Our home for 11
months..
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 9 of 362 --

And somehow despite those
circumstances, we were able to build a
team to drive this business forward...
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 10 of 362 --

&& I am beyond grateful for the
challenges we were given the
opportunity to overcome in the
beginning...
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 11 of 362 --

Because if we had not learned how to
drive a team forward while paying low
salaries….
….we would not have SURVIVED to a
point where we could pay what we do
now.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 12 of 362 --

And by the end of this presentation my
goal is you will know how you can do it
too..
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 13 of 362 --

But before I get going...in order to
understand what you must do, you must
understand where you are now...
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 14 of 362 --

Each one of you came into this group
after (or while) completing Gym Launch
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 15 of 362 --

Which essentially broke your business
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 16 of 362 --

And sent your self-esteem right down the
pooper
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 17 of 362 --

“I thought I knew what I was doing”
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 18 of 362 --

That’s what most of you say
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 19 of 362 --

And then you decide to join Legacy...
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 20 of 362 --

And you realize you’re not alone.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 21 of 362 --

But…
Most of you in this room
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 22 of 362 --

Are not reaching your full potential
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 23 of 362 --

You watch the ‘top dogs’ in the group
post about their success and think to
yourself...
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 24 of 362 --

“He got lucky with his market”
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 25 of 362 --

“She’s hot of course she has so many
clients and is so good at sales”
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 26 of 362 --

“He has wayyyy more sales experience
than me OBVIOUSLY that’s why he has
more clients”
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 27 of 362 --

“She started running the challenge down
the street from me just 4 months before
me, she’s the reason i’m not getting any
new business...”
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 28 of 362 --

STOP MAKING EXCUSES
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 29 of 362 --

And most importantly, stop claiming
“I’m not making excuses but….”
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 30 of 362 --

NO.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 31 of 362 --

It’s NOT because you don’t have enough
leads...
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 32 of 362 --

It’s NOT because you can’t get people
to show…...
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 33 of 362 --

It’s NOT because you don’t have stellar
sales skills...
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 34 of 362 --

It’s NOT because you lack amazing
service….
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 35 of 362 --

It’s NOT because your market is
‘too small’
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 36 of 362 --

It’s NOT because your market is
‘TOO SATURATED’
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 37 of 362 --

It’s because you have yet to come to a
place of maturity in your business
career where you have realized it all
comes down to
ONE THING
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 38 of 362 --

The culture
you have created...
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 39 of 362 --

And if you have failed to intentionally
build that culture, you have ended up
with an “accidental” culture
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 40 of 362 --

But only intentional foundations lead to
ORGANIC GROWTH of a business
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 41 of 362 --

So my question for you all is...
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 42 of 362 --

Are you intentionally creating the future
for your business?
….or are you just waiting for the future
to happen to you?
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 43 of 362 --

You can get more leads...
You can get more front end sales..
You can make your workouts cooler..
You can open a location in a ‘better’
market
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 44 of 362 --

But I promise you...
you’re putting a bandaid on a wound that
needs stitches.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 45 of 362 --

So….
Let today be the day you decide to move
forward doing what is RIGHT, even
though it is what is HARD.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 46 of 362 --

I promise you, there is nobody in here
more “deserving” of success than you...
There are only those who earn it through
hard work...
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 47 of 362 --

Why am I so certain this is where your
focus must go?
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 48 of 362 --

Because what helps a business survive
and thrive today is vastly different than
what it was 20...10...even 2 years ago...
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 49 of 362 --

Books that paved the path to build a
business 3 years ago are irrelevant AF
today...
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 50 of 362 --

Which is why you must remember it is
not the SMARTEST business that will
survive but the most ADAPTABLE
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 51 of 362 --

Going hand in hand, it is not the
SMARTEST team that will survive, it is
the most ADAPTABLE.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 52 of 362 --

Efficiency is important, but adaptivity is
imperative...
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 53 of 362 --

Our entire planet has been changed by
technology, and that technology is
changing at a rate that surpasses 99% of
people's ability to adapt
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 54 of 362 --

They call this the
“OH SHIT” gap...
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 55 of 362 --

And most of you in this room are only as
successful
as your environment allows you to be...
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 56 of 362 --

You are successful as long as FB cost is
low enough
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 57 of 362 --

You are successful as long as you have
a technology that allows you to nurture
your leads
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 58 of 362 --

You are successful as long as your
trainers don’t leave
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 59 of 362 --

You are successful as long as your sales
manager is having a good day….
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 60 of 362 --

You are successful as long as the
software you utilize doesn’t decide to 4x
in cost overnight...
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 61 of 362 --

But REALITY is these things are all
outside of your control.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 62 of 362 --

And the only thing inside your control is
how you prepare and react to this rapid
changes...
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 63 of 362 --

Many of you focus on getting REALLY
good at certain processes, as well as
your team...
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 64 of 362 --

And whenever we get REALLY good at
something, and it changes, we take
about 11x as long to pivot.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 65 of 362 --

But, in order to survive in TODAY’S
world of business...you must accept what
I am telling you and focus on creating an
ADAPTABLE business.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 66 of 362 --

You must all accept that our environment
is far from static, and you must structure
your business in a way that caters to
constant change.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 67 of 362 --

And that starts with creating a high
performing team and culture that lives
and breaths this concept...
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 68 of 362 --

So let’s dive in..
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 69 of 362 --

1.) What is Culture
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 70 of 362 --

It is the personality of the company as a whole.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 71 of 362 --

What is culture made of?
Culture is made out of the people we hire
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 72 of 362 --

So… if culture is the personality of the
company…
and the personality is made of the people…
….what is the root of what dictates the culture?
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 73 of 362 --

The values of the people we hire
Your company values are the behaviors and
skills that you CREATE in your teammates
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 74 of 362 --

That is why you must take your culture so
seriously.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 75 of 362 --

It’s nice to have the right people on the bus but
it’s even more critical to keep the wrong people
off the bus…
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 76 of 362 --

You create your culture intentionally by who
you…
HIRE
FIRE
PROMOTE
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 77 of 362 --

By doing so, you SHOW others what you really
value…
...even if its nothing at all.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 78 of 362 --

That being said...
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 79 of 362 --

Culture is to recruiting….
….as product is to marketing.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 80 of 362 --

Customers are more easily attracted when you
have a great product. Makes sense.
The right people are more easily attracted
when you have a great culture. Makes sense.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 81 of 362 --

Here’s the kicker
It stops here for most businesses…
…..but not in a service based business like
everyone here in this room...
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 82 of 362 --

Can anyone guess why?
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 83 of 362 --

The service your team provides to your
customers is a DILUTED version of the
same service you provide your team.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 84 of 362 --

Physical Product Business
Customer gives you money 	Customer receives product
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 85 of 362 --

Service Business
Customer gives you $$ 	Team provides service/fulfillment 	Customer receives ‘product’
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 86 of 362 --

Service Business
Customer gives you $$ 	Team provides service/fulfillment 	Customer receives ‘product’
Where 99% of service
businesses fail
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 87 of 362 --

RIGHT.
How do you not do ‘that’?
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 88 of 362 --

Well...let me ask you something to
prove this point….
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 89 of 362 --

Who here has seen an ad for
Starbucks?
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 90 of 362 --

Why do I ask?
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 91 of 362 --

Starbucks only puts 1.4% of revenue
into Marketing
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 92 of 362 --

Compared to similar revenue
businesses like Coca Cola, McDonalds
& Pepsi who spend between 11-15%
of revenue.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 93 of 362 --

Back in 1987 when Starbucks had 17
locations, CEO Howard Schultz made
a “Crazy” decision...
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 94 of 362 --

He commanded they reallocate their
entire marketing budget to employee
training.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 95 of 362 --

His investors tried to overthrow him…
Why would you invest more into your
people when the company is BLEEDING
CASH?
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 96 of 362 --

Seems like it turned out ok.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 97 of 362 --

To this day, their strategy is
PEOPLE FIRST
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 98 of 362 --

That decision, was made by a CEO
intentionally building the foundation
for the future of the business.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 99 of 362 --

One of the most important principles
that needs to be understood by you as
a business owner is that of
sacrificing short term gain for long
term stability
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 100 of 362 --

“Culture and profitability are connected
at the hip”
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 101 of 362 --

So… the question is… how do YOU
apply these same principles….
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 102 of 362 --

...with less capital resources
.... less experience
...less talent reach
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 103 of 362 --

How do YOU put your people first?
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 104 of 362 --

How to Create a High
Performance Culture
Without High Performance
Pay
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 105 of 362 --

In order to create this, you must first
understand what this is NOT
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 106 of 362 --

High Performance Culture is NOT
...having team happy hours and bar
outings on a weekly or even monthly
basis...
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 107 of 362 --

High Performance Culture is NOT
..being bottom line driven
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 108 of 362 --

High Performance Culture is NOT
Being so afraid of fucking up Gym
Legacy you micromanage the sh*t
out of your team and don’t allow
them to think for themselves or
innovate...
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 109 of 362 --

High Performance Culture is NOT
Talking down to your team rather
than side by side
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 110 of 362 --

High Performance Culture is NOT
Focusing on only the positive and
shielding your team from the REAL
SHIT happening “behind closed
doors”
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 111 of 362 --

High Performance Culture IS….
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 112 of 362 --

1. Being driven by PURPOSE not
PROFIT
2. Living by your Core Values
3. Executing the 5 Core Functions
Internally
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 113 of 362 --

What is this “stuff” ?
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 114 of 362 --

This is the BORING sh*t that makes
you MONEY.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 115 of 362 --

The shit most of you skip over in the
Legacy Portal because you’d rather
just run more ads…..
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 116 of 362 --

REAL TALK
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 117 of 362 --

#1 You must be driven by
your PURPOSE not your
PROFIT
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 118 of 362 --

But what does that mean anyway?
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 119 of 362 --

A mission is the what you’re trying to
accomplish, and a purpose is the
why
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 120 of 362 --

WHAT: Help 10,000 people in our
community lose weight
WHY: ????? ←-- your story
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 121 of 362 --

“Great businesses are built off of
great stories”
Reid Hoffman
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 122 of 362 --

WHY did you start a gym?
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 123 of 362 --

WHY do you continue to sell people?
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 124 of 362 --

WHY did you come to this event?
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 125 of 362 --

WHY should your team give a shit
about any of this??
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 126 of 362 --

Your teams are not motivated by your
personal desires as an owner…
...and if that’s what drives you - they are
the first to know it.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 127 of 362 --

How do I know this?
Because I KNOW IT.
(and I am definitely not as close to you as them)
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 128 of 362 --

I see this time and time again in the
group...
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 129 of 362 --

You stagnate month over month….
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 130 of 362 --

You stagnate month over month….
You stop allocating discretionary time toward your
business and direct it elsewhere….
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 131 of 362 --

You stagnate month over month….
You stop allocating discretionary time toward your
business and direct it elsewhere….
You start buying stuff you definitely shouldn't be
because you ‘deserve it’
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 132 of 362 --

You stagnate month over month….
You stop allocating discretionary time toward your
business and direct it elsewhere….
You start buying stuff you definitely shouldn't be
because you ‘deserve it’
You STOP pressing on the GAS
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 133 of 362 --

Why do you do this?
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 134 of 362 --

Because whether you want to admit
it or not, you have created a
business to serve
you and only you.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 135 of 362 --

And once you have surpassed your
level of income needed to be
comfortable… you stop pushing.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 136 of 362 --

If your WHY was truly greater than
yourself…
...you WOULD NEVER STOP
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 137 of 362 --

I say this as someone who lives this.
I do not need more...but if I let my own
selfish needs be my WHY….
…. I would have already stopped.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 138 of 362 --

INSTEAD I choose to be driven by a bigger
purpose, a WHY that is greater than myself
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 139 of 362 --

I choose to be driven by an entire
industry’s needs
….starting with those of every single
person in this room...
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 140 of 362 --

And the blunt truth is that if you felt
that way about your business….
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 141 of 362 --

Your free time…
Your extra cash…
Your extra energy….
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 142 of 362 --

It would all be leveraged to bring you
closer to realizing your WHY and
SOLVING the problem you have
chosen to fight for.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 143 of 362 --

Your job as the CEO of your
company is to constantly remind
your team of WHY WHY WHY
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 144 of 362 --

Every single
decision you make should be for the
sake of your WHY
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 145 of 362 --

WHYYYYY does Gym Launch go so
fast?
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 146 of 362 --

WHYYYYY does Gym Launch have
such high standards of teammates?
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 147 of 362 --

WHYYYYY is Gym Launch so
ruthless in how we hire/fire/promote?
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 148 of 362 --

BECAUSE….
We demand it of ourselves to bring
this industry from its KNEES to its
FEET
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 149 of 362 --

And we know, we can only do that if
we recruit the best of the best and
demand they reach their highest
potential.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 150 of 362 --

… so my question for each of you is,
do you talk about your business like
that?
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 151 of 362 --

Do you demand high performance
for the sake of your WHY?
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 152 of 362 --

DO YOU HAVE A WHY?
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 153 of 362 --

Because if you don’t… that is why
you don’t have high performers...
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 154 of 362 --

Because YOU are not a high
performing CEO...
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 155 of 362 --

www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 156 of 362 --

#2 Live or Die by Your
Values
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 157 of 362 --

Can anyone here tell me the fastest
way to lose respect from your team?
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 158 of 362 --

Tell them what your values are...
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 159 of 362 --

...and then don’t live by them.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 160 of 362 --

Host a meeting announcing your
Core Values…..
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 161 of 362 --

….and then forget about them...
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 162 of 362 --

Let them become a meaningless
artifact that hangs on your wall
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 163 of 362 --

A reminder of how great your
company could have been….
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 164 of 362 --

NO.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 165 of 362 --

You must be to your team..
..who Alex is to you
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 166 of 362 --

You must be a person who they
aspire to be in one way or another.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 167 of 362 --

And that starts with embodying the
values and beliefs others aspire to.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 168 of 362 --

If you want a high performing team
you simply do the following...
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 169 of 362 --

1.) Study the values of high
performance teams and companies
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 170 of 362 --

1.) Study the values of high
performance teams and companies
2.) Assimilate those values
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 171 of 362 --

1.) Study the values of high
performance teams and companies
2.) Assimilate those values
3.) Preach those values
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 172 of 362 --

1.) Study the values of high
performance teams and companies
2.) Assimilate those values
3.) Preach those values
4.) Repeat & Improve
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 173 of 362 --

1.) Study the values of high
performance teams and companies
2.) Assimilate those values
3.) Preach those values
4.) Repeat & Improve
EVERYDAY
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 174 of 362 --

Gym Launch Core Values
1. Grow or Die

-- 179 of 362 --

WHY are each of these our Core
Values?
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 180 of 362 --

Let me explain
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 181 of 362 --

Grow or Die
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 182 of 362 --

Businesses don’t grow...
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 183 of 362 --

You grow people...
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 184 of 362 --

And they grow your business...
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 185 of 362 --

So what is the factor that allows
businesses to GROW OR DIE?
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 186 of 362 --

The growth or stagnation of the
people RUNNING IT
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 187 of 362 --

Speed is King
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 188 of 362 --

Fast Companies Dominate the Market
Slow Companies Die Off
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 189 of 362 --

July 2017 Alex & I we’re invited to a
private mastermind by Russell Brunson
at Pirates Cove
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 190 of 362 --

At that point, it was me, Alex & one assistant...
….we had started Gym Launch as we know it
today 3 months prior
...we had gone from 0 to 350k/month while
selling from our coffee table in our 1800 sq ft
apartment
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 191 of 362 --

We got up in front of 10 other business
owners (all doing upwards of 10
million/year) and told them what we
were doing
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 192 of 362 --

“Yeah so its me and Leila, were selling
like 10-15 gyms a week & making like
350k a month. Our client results are
insane. It’s going really well”
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 193 of 362 --

The room was silent
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 194 of 362 --

What was said next I will never forget...
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 195 of 362 --

Jason Fladlien, the most successful
man in the room, known for making 27
million in ONE DAY, stood up and
said...
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 196 of 362 --

“When it feels EASY is when you need
to step on the gas”
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 197 of 362 --

www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 198 of 362 --

“Because if your system does what you
say it does...someone bigger and
badder will come and take everything
you have...and not even think twice.”
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 199 of 362 --

Everyone else then jumped in with their
reasons for why speed is so
important….
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 200 of 362 --

“New products and product features come to market at
an insanely fast rate”
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 201 of 362 --

“New products and product features come to market at
an insanely fast rate”
“When someone sees a good idea, copying is almost
immediate and they will try to outpace you”
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 202 of 362 --

We left Pirates Cove completely
mindf**ked with a sense of urgency that
I cannot describe…
...and it has not left ever since
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 203 of 362 --

But...what we did know for certain was
that...
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

are built by
Fast people
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 206 of 362 --

The PEOPLE With The Highest
Standards Will Win
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 207 of 362 --

What is a “standard”?
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 208 of 362 --

It is a BELIEF about what you will
TOLERATE.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 209 of 362 --

WHY WAS HE SO SPECIAL?
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 210 of 362 --

Because…
...he had a vision of what was possible and
would let NO ONE impose their limitations.
...instead he forced his CONVICTION onto
them.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 211 of 362 --

Because…
...he did not build the iphone. He built the
team that BELIEVED it could be done.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 212 of 362 --

Because…
...he tolerated nothing less than
excellence.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 213 of 362 --

Because…
...he tolerated nothing less than
excellence.
...he tolerated nothing less than insane
speed
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 214 of 362 --

Because…
...he tolerated nothing less than
excellence.
...he tolerated nothing less than insane
speed
...he took absolute responsibility for the
ease of use for the customer...that is how
you become a dominating force in your
market.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 215 of 362 --

You need to create the VISION of your business
and DEMAND it become reality...
...find those who will help you turn it into reality.
...and cut out anyone who slows you down or
attempts to put their limitations on YOU
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 216 of 362 --

www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 217 of 362 --

Honesty leaves zero room for assumptions.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 218 of 362 --

Honesty leaves zero room for assumptions.
Honest feedback is the only catalyst for growth
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 219 of 362 --

Honesty leaves zero room for assumptions.
Honest feedback is the only catalyst for growth
When you are not honest, people know & they lose respect
for you
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 220 of 362 --

Honesty leaves zero room for assumptions.
Honest feedback is the only catalyst for growth
When you are not honest, people know & they lose respect
for you
Honesty often dilutes as you move deeper into an
organization and scale
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 222 of 362 --

When asked what his job as CEO is…
CEO of Facebook, Mark Zuckerberg’s
answer….
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 223 of 362 --

“To be a Truth-Teller”
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 224 of 362 --

Do you know what separates good
entrepreneurs and leaders from great ones?
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 225 of 362 --

Some say it’s their ability to learn from their
mistakes, but I think it’s their
ability to handle and tell the truth.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 226 of 362 --

The truth about the market conditions…www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 227 of 362 --

The truth about the market conditions…
The truth about how good their customer service is…
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 228 of 362 --

The truth about the market conditions…
The truth about how good (or bad) their customer service
is…
The truth about how engaged their teams are…
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 229 of 362 --

The truth about the market conditions…
The truth about how good their customer service is…
The truth about how engaged their teams are…
The truth about where they fall short as a leader…
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 230 of 362 --

The truth about the market conditions…
The truth about how good their customer service is…
The truth about how engaged their teams are…
The truth about where they fall short as a leader…
The truth about what the team really thinks about them…
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 231 of 362 --

The truth about the market conditions…
The truth about how good their customer service is…
The truth about how engaged their teams are…
The truth about where they fall short as a leader…
The truth about what the team really thinks about them…
The truth about what you really need (not want) to do
to grow your business...
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 232 of 362 --

“Truth will always be truth, regardless of
lack of understanding, disbelief or
ignorance”
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 233 of 362 --

As a business owner, you should be doing
what’s best for the business.
What’s best for your business is what’s best
for you
…even if that means your ego gets crushed
...even if that means you’re wrong
...even if that means you don’t like it
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 234 of 362 --

Be Your Own Boss
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 235 of 362 --

Be Your Own Boss
● Hold YOURSELF to a higher standard than anyone
else would ask of you.
● Manage your own time/resources/etc…
● OWN your decisions and outcomes
● Act like you are the owner
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 236 of 362 --

1) Hold Yourself To A Higher Standard Than
Anyone Else Would Ask of You
Owners
CUSTOMERS
Expectations
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 237 of 362 --

Hold Yourself To A Higher Standard Than
Anyone Else Would Ask of You
Owners
CUSTOMERS
Expectations 	Responsibility
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 238 of 362 --

Hold Yourself To A Higher Standard Than
Anyone Else Would Ask of You
Owners
CUSTOMERS
Expectations 	Responsibility 	Compensation
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 239 of 362 --

To the person with the highest
expectations, goes the most
responsibility.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 240 of 362 --

Want to move up?
...Create higher expectations for
yourself and your department than
those above.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 241 of 362 --

At the end of the day, people did not
cry at Steve Jobs funeral because
they knew him.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 242 of 362 --

They cried because of what he
represented...and the values he
believed. What he stood for.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 243 of 362 --

Because he had higher
expectations of himself and the
products he produced than anyone
else.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 244 of 362 --

Be Your Own Boss
● Hold YOURSELF to a higher standard than anyone else
would ask of you.
● Manage your own time/resources/etc…
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 245 of 362 --

2) Manage Your Own Time & Resources
Independently
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 246 of 362 --

2) Manage Your Own Time & Resources Independently
a) We do not have time to micromanage you. That is
NOT a good use of our human capital (aka people
the company pays to pay attention).
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 247 of 362 --

2) Manage Your Own Time & Resources Independently
a) We do not have time to micromanage you. That is NOT a
good use of our human capital (aka people the company
pays to pay attention).
b) We are virtual. We reward on PRODUCTION &
EFFECTIVENESS not “how hard or how long you
worked.”
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 248 of 362 --

2) Manage Your Own Time & Resources Independently
a) We do not have time to micromanage you. That is NOT a
good use of our human capital (aka people the company
pays to pay attention).
b) We are virtual. We reward on PRODUCTION &
EFFECTIVENESS not “how hard or how long you
worked.”
c) If we need to check in to see what you are
doing...you probably aren’t doing enough.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 249 of 362 --

Be Your Own Boss
● Hold YOURSELF to a higher standard than anyone else
would ask of you.
● Manage your own time/resources/etc…
● OWN your decisions and outcomes
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 250 of 362 --

Own Your Decisions, Own Your Outcomes
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 251 of 362 --

Own Your Decisions, Own Your Outcomes
If you EVER blame anyone but yourself, you will identify yourself as a
loser.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 252 of 362 --

Own Your Decisions, Own Your Outcomes
If you EVER blame anyone but yourself, you will identify yourself as a loser.
Take FULL responsibility for your entire life AND outcomes.
“We are all self-made. Only the successful acknowledge it.”
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 253 of 362 --

Own Your Decisions, Own Your Outcomes
If you EVER blame anyone but yourself, you will identify yourself as a loser.
Take FULL responsibility for your entire life AND outcomes.
“We are all self-made. Only the successful acknowledge it.”
When we point our fingers anywhere but ourselves, we give all our
power to where we point and eliminate our opportunity for growth.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 254 of 362 --

Own Your Decisions, Own Your Outcomes
If you EVER blame anyone but yourself, you will identify yourself as a loser.
Take FULL responsibility for your entire life AND outcomes.
“We are all self-made. Only the successful acknowledge it.”
When we point our fingers anywhere but ourselves, we give all our power to
where we point and eliminate our opportunity for growth.
If the ideal outcome is not achieved...who’s fault is it?
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

would ask of you.

● OWN your decisions and outcomes
● Act like you are the owner
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 256 of 362 --

Act Like You Are The Owner
A) If you want to be more valuable...understand how the
entire business works.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 257 of 362 --

Act Like You Are The Owner
A) If you want to be more valuable...understand how the
entire business works.
Your insight will be more valuable.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 258 of 362 --

Act Like You Are The Owner
A) If you want to be more valuable...understand how the
entire business works.
Your insight will be more valuable.
Nothing is more “junior” than someone looking through a
pinhole to say how things “should be.”
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 259 of 362 --

Act Like You Are The Owner
A) If you want to be more valuable...understand how the
entire business works.
Your insight will be more valuable.
Nothing is more “junior” than someone looking through a
pinhole to say how things “should be.”
If you don’t know, ask. (That’s how you learn)
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

Functions Internally
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

depends on the quality of
your attention

Culture

Attention
Team &
Culture
Leads
DeliverySales
Resell
Retention
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 264 of 362 --

take care of the business...
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 265 of 362 --

YOU NEED TO STOP DOING
YOU NEED TO START COACHING
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 266 of 362 --

www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 267 of 362 --

“It will save me time if I just do it
myself”
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 268 of 362 --

“It will save me time if I just do it
myself”
What you’re really saying is…
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 269 of 362 --

“It will save me time if I just do it
myself”
What you’re really saying is…
I don’t believe it’s worth my time to let
them try, because they won’t get it
right anyway...
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 270 of 362 --

“Too much is at stake to allow this to
go wrong”
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 271 of 362 --

“Too much is at stake to allow this to
go wrong”
What you’re really saying is…
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 272 of 362 --

“Too much is at stake to allow this to
go wrong”
What you’re really saying is…
I don’t trust them to do their jobs
according to my standards...
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 273 of 362 --

“It’s my credibility/money on the line if
we don’t get it done on time”
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 274 of 362 --

“It’s my credibility/money on the line if
we don’t get it done on time”
What you’re really saying is…
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 275 of 362 --

“It’s my credibility/money on the line if
we don’t get it done on time”
What you’re really saying is…
The work won’t get done unless I
constantly prod them...
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 276 of 362 --

“My team likes to see me heavily
involved in the dirty work”
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 277 of 362 --

“My team likes to see me heavily
involved in the dirty work”
What you’re really saying is…
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 278 of 362 --

“My team likes to see me heavily
involved in the dirty work”
What you’re really saying is…
If i don’t stay involved, how else will I
prove my investment and worth to
them...
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 279 of 362 --

These are all prime examples of
sacrificing short term gain
(speed/efficiency) for long term
stability...
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 280 of 362 --

So, now that you know your focus
should be on finding and coaching
your team, let’s dive in...
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 282 of 362 --

5 Core Functions
Lead Gen ----> Challengers/Members
Lead Nurture ----> Call/Schedule/ALN
Sales ----> Get the Moniez
Fulfillment ----> Deliver amazing service
Resell/Ascension ----> HTP/membership/semi
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 299 of 362 --

#2 Applicant Nurture
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 300 of 362 --

Golden Rules of Applicant Nurture
1. Tell people what you need them to do
2. Tell people where they stand with you
3. Speed is King
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 301 of 362 --

Tell People what you need them to do
(hmmm seems similar to marketing)
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 302 of 362 --

Tell People Where They Stand With
You
1. Candidate Declination Email
2. Candidate Next Interview Email
3. Candidate Job Offer CALL then Email
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 303 of 362 --

Tell People Where They Stand With
You
1. Clarity (YES/NO/WAITING)
2. Timeline
3. Thank You
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 304 of 362 --

Speed is King
The average hiring process takes 25 days...
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 305 of 362 --

Speed is King
...but the best candidates find jobs in 10
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 306 of 362 --

Faster Response times
mean faster hiring
mean higher quality
teammates
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 307 of 362 --

#3 Interviewing
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 308 of 362 --

Top 3 MUSTS when Interviewing
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 309 of 362 --

1. Be Yourself
2. Sell Yourself
3. ..But Don’t Oversell Yourself
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 310 of 362 --

Be Yourself
If you want the candidate to show their true
selves….you must show your true self…
….energy is contagious
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 311 of 362 --

Sell Yourself
Why are you here?
What was the problem with your last job?
----> Label Pain
----> Sell Vacation
----> Explain away concern
----> Reinforce
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 312 of 362 --

Sell Yourself
Sounds familiar?
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 313 of 362 --

Don’t Oversell Yourself
Remember to do a “takeway” sale
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 314 of 362 --

Don’t Oversell Yourself
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 315 of 362 --

#4 Onboarding/Training
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 316 of 362 --

1. Give Context Not Commands
2. Onboarding should reflect ACTUAL role
3. Set Proper Expectations
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 317 of 362 --

Context is…
● Immersing the new teammate in the
company’s vision and culture
● Explaining your WHY
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 318 of 362 --

Context is Not…
● Having someone go through a checklist
everyday
● Memorizing core tenants
● Isolating someone to their role and not
giving them explanation of everyone’s role
in company
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 319 of 362 --

Onboarding Should Reflect the Role
Is this role a “figurer-outer” role or a “do the
same thing everyday” role?
Cool….
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 320 of 362 --

Onboarding Should Reflect the Role
...don't put a figure outer through a step by step
process onboarding…
….and don't put a ‘do the same thing everyday’
role through an unclear onboarding...
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 321 of 362 --

Set Proper Expectationswww.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 322 of 362 --

Set Proper Expectationswww.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 323 of 362 --

#5 Retention/Ascension
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 324 of 362 --

First you must decide if they are a
Leader or Individual Contributor…
...This determines whether you retain
or ascend and retain...
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 325 of 362 --

WHY is this so important?
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 326 of 362 --

TOO MANY PEOPLE
OVER-PROMOTE!
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 327 of 362 --

“Over-Promoting” is the result of lack
of objective insight combined with
personal bias.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 328 of 362 --

Most promotion decisions tend to place more
weight on current performance of teammates
rather than the measurement of their skills
required to rise to the next level
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 329 of 362 --

The most productive/high performing
worker is not always the best candidate
for manager.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 330 of 362 --

Often, what gets someone there is what
will also HINDER them from going
further...
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 331 of 362 --

And yet, companies are more likely to
promote the top performers than anyone
else…
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 332 of 362 --

For a variety of reasons...
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 333 of 362 --

● You want them to ‘grow’ for ‘growth’s sake’ not
because they actually have…
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 334 of 362 --

● You want them to ‘grow’ for ‘growth’s sake’ not
because they actually have…
● You assume skills will translate
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 335 of 362 --

● You want them to ‘grow’ for ‘growth’s sake’ not
because they actually have…
● You assume skills will translate
● You feel indebted
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 336 of 362 --

As a business owner, your #1 responsibility is
to do what is best for the business, regardless
of whose feelings get hurt.
Hurt feelings or go out of business, up to you.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 337 of 362 --

You Must Know the Difference…
What is an individual contributor? They are the outliers on the team, those who are
clearly the highest performers and whose numbers consistently outdo those of the
rest of the team. Often, these people don’t have enough self-awareness yet to
realize they are best suited to stay here, and their managers don’t have enough
awareness to put in place the best retention tools and incentives to keep them
performing/fulfilled without moving into a leadership position.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 338 of 362 --

So how do we retain both???
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 339 of 362 --

Be Clear when Promoting
● Identify areas of incompetence with Teammate
● Teammate needs to SELF-identify areas
● Coaching plan needs to be put in place (Extra 1-1’s, Cross Departmental,
Shadowing, Etc…)
● Emotional Capacity must be identified. What is their emotional capacity? The
higher you get, the more emotional work is involved.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 340 of 362 --

Other Effective Retention Strategies
● Consider lateral moves, not just upward moves (these tend to provide the same
growth desired)
● Invest in their skill growth (events, conferences, groups to join, courses to take)
● Assign Stretch Goals that cross departments
● Add "ranks" or "merit badges" - Instead of creating a "new system" take the
existing path and add new titles that are achievable on shorter time horizons.
● Pair them with ANOTHER leader for mentorship/friendship
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 341 of 362 --

WHEWWWWW that’s it.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
